input.headline: The Weeknd’s ‘After Hours ‘Til Dawn’ Tour grosses over $1 billion, Live Nation says

raw.headline: The Weeknd’s ‘After Hours ‘Til Dawn’ Tour grosses over $1 billion, Live Nation says

winner: Why did The Weeknd's tour need a security detail? Because it was grossing over a billion dollars and they didn't want anyone trying to "Blinding Lights" in their wallet!

candidates.text: Why did The Weeknd bring a calculator on his tour? Because he wanted to make sure the total earnings added up to more than just "After Hours"!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 7.5, "reason": "The joke is clever and ties the album title to the tour's financial success, but it relies on a somewhat predictable pun and lacks deeper surprise or specificity."}

candidates.text: Why did The Weeknd's tour need a security detail? Because it was grossing over a billion dollars and they didn't want anyone trying to "Blinding Lights" in their wallet!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 7.5, "reason": "The joke is clever with a play on 'Blinding Lights' and the financial success of the tour, but the setup could be tighter for maximum impact."}

candidates.text: Why did The Weeknd refuse to take a nap during his tour? Because he was afraid of falling behind hours 'till dawn!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke plays on the tour name with a pun involving 'hours 'till dawn,' but it's somewhat forced and lacks surprise. It's understandable but not particularly clever or specific to the headline."}

candidates.text: Why don't The Weeknd need an alarm clock? Because he can always wake up when his concert grosses 'After Hours 'Til Dawn'!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat clever with the play on 'After Hours 'Til Dawn' and the idea of not needing an alarm clock, but it's a bit forced and lacks punch. The connection between grossing money and waking up is weak, reducing the surprise and specificity."}

candidates.text: Wow, I didn't realize The Weeknd was running a side hustle as a night shift janitor.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat surprising and specific, but the reference to a 'night shift janitor' feels forced and doesn't directly tie into the headline's context about tour earnings."}
